# Sauhard Srivastava

Academic website for Sauhard Srivastava, PhD candidate in Economics at the University of Minnesota and Research Analyst at the Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis.

Primary pages:
- Homepage: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/
- Research: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/research
- CV: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/cv
- Sitemap: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/sitemap.xml

Research fields:
- Macroeconomics
- International Macroeconomics
- Monetary Economics
- Exchange Rates
- Financial Frictions
- Heterogeneous Agent Models

Research papers:
- Import Price Spikes and Real Income Stabilization through Exchange Rates in a Heterogeneous Agent Economy
  URL: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/research#import-price-spikes-exchange-rates
  Keywords: exchange rates, import price shocks, real income stabilization, heterogeneous agents, small open economy, monetary policy, financial frictions

- Financial Frictions, FX Reserves, and Exchange Rate Management in Emerging Economies
  URL: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/research#financial-frictions-fx-reserves-exchange-rate-management
  PDF: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/papers/reserves2024.pdf
  DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jinteco.2026.104282
  Keywords: FX reserves, exchange rate management, financial frictions, emerging economies, interest parity gaps, local-currency debt, central banks

- The Transition to Net Zero in a Small Open Economy
  URL: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/research#net-zero-small-open-economy
  PDF: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1t-vdiOhsgqmXOeoc4e9UwTRG7-6BqJsU/view
  Keywords: net zero, small open economy, fossil fuels, real exchange rate, current account, Japan, climate transition

- The Price of Quality: Demand-Driven Technology Choice and the Penn Effect
  URL: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/research#price-of-quality-penn-effect
  PDF: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/papers/hbs_new2025.pdf
  Keywords: Penn effect, quality upgrading, non-tradeable goods, technology choice, income-dependent preferences, price levels, Penn World Table

- Productivity and real exchange rates for India: does Balassa-Samuelson effect explain?
  URL: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/research#productivity-real-exchange-rates-india-balassa-samuelson
  DOI: https://doi.org/10.1108/IGDR-11-2022-0130
  Keywords: real exchange rates, India, Balassa-Samuelson effect, sectoral productivity, KLEMS, labour market frictions

- Labour Disputes and the Manufacturing Sector's Growth: Recent Evidence from Indian States
  URL: https://sauhardsriv.github.io/research#labour-disputes-manufacturing-growth-indian-states
  DOI: https://doi.org/10.4236/tel.2022.123036
  Keywords: labour disputes, manufacturing, Indian states, capital-labour ratios, total factor productivity, two-stage least squares

Contact policy:
- Please use the public website and listed professional links for verification. This file intentionally omits direct email addresses.
